\tzpentry{ID3784}{Phase Field Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3784 introduces Phase Field Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \frac{d\phi_i}{dt}, \end{equation}
